characters.name: Biblical figure (possibly a patriarch, king, or prophet)

event: Life of Christ — stained glass detail of an elderly figure in contemplation
symbols: hand to chin in thought — deep contemplation, possibly a prophet meditating on the mystery of Christ
red headdress — authority or priestly status
golden crown or ornament visible — royal or sacerdotal dignity
description: A close-up detail from a stained glass window in the church of Saint-Sulpice de Fougeres, showing the face and upper body of an elderly bearded man. He wears a blue robe and a red turban or headdress, with what appears to be a golden crown visible at the upper right edge. His expression is deeply thoughtful, with his hand raised to his chin in a gesture of contemplation or concern. The face is rendered with remarkable realism for stained glass, with deep wrinkles, a flowing beard, and a penetrating gaze.
theological_description: This stained glass detail, from a cycle depicting the Life of Christ, likely represents a figure from the Passion narrative — perhaps Nicodemus, Joseph of Arimathea, or a high priest contemplating the events surrounding Christ's trial and death. The thoughtful gesture suggests a man weighing momentous decisions or pondering divine mysteries. If a member of the Sanhedrin, the figure may embody the theological crisis described in John 11:49-52, where Caiaphas inadvertently prophesied that Jesus would die for the nation. If Nicodemus, the contemplative posture recalls his nighttime visit to Jesus (John 3:1-2) and his defense of Jesus before the council (John 7:50-51). The stained glass medium itself carries theological meaning: as light passes through colored glass to create images, so divine truth is transmitted through material creation — an incarnational theology expressed in the very medium of the church window.

scripture_refs.reason: Nicodemus coming to Jesus by night to ponder His teachings — the contemplative figure possibly representing this seeker
Nicodemus defending Jesus before the council — a righteous man weighing truth amid opposition
Simeon waiting for the consolation of Israel — an elderly figure contemplating God's plan
